name: 49ers
description:
'''49ers''' was an [[Italo house|Italian house]] and [[Eurodance]] [[musical ensemble|act]], featuring [[Record producer|producers]] and [[disc jockey|DJs]] [[Gianfranco Bortolotti]], Luca Cittadini, Diego Leoni and Pieradis Rossini with vocalist Ann-Marie Smith. They were named after the [[San Francisco 49ers]] [[American football]] team.

In 1990, two of their songs reached number-one on the [[United States|US]] ''[[Billboard (magazine)|Billboard]]'' [[Hot Dance Club Songs|Hot Dance Club Play]] [[record chart|chart]]; "[[Touch Me (49ers song)|Touch Me]]" and "[[Don't You Love Me (49ers song)|Don't You Love Me]]".
